steps: SOAPdenovo2 based DBG construction and Trinity based low frequency k-mer removal.
Map reads to the contigs and build linkages. a) Utilizing single-end read information b) Utilizing paired-end read information c) Merge the linkages
Remove erroneous and redundant linkages a) Manage ambiguous contigs b) Linearize contigs into scaffolds
Divide graph into sub-graph. Oases based graph traversal.
Gap closure and output the transcripts.
creator: Haorong Lu
